prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Locates & marking, part of the Sitework & Utilities scope. The observed field condition is: mechanical digging inside tolerance zone. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: 811/CGA best practices.
title: Compliance check: Locates & marking (commercial project)
